title: fraxinus ornus f. argentea
intro: Fraxinus ornus f. argentea, also known as Silver White Ash, is a cultivar of the white ash tree (Fraxinus ornus), a deciduous tree native to Europe and Western Asia. The bark of the Fraxinus ornus f. argentea has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from pain, reduced fever, and improved cardiovascular health, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Fraxinus ornus f. argentea include bark extracts, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote natural healing.
